response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally skilled and experienced software engineer with a strong background in distributed systems, real-time applications, and a commendable commitment to software craftsmanship. While his recent role at Google hints at AI-agent infrastructure experience and he has some fintech exposure, his resume does not demonstrate the required executive-level technical leadership in scaling engineering organizations (10-30+ people), nor does it show deep, production-level experience architecting complex multi-agent AI systems within a regulated financial context, which are critical for this CTO position.
strengths: Deep expertise in backend, distributed systems, microservices, and high-performance real-time applications.
Recent experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and frameworks at Google.
Strong software craftsmanship principles (TDD, CI/CD) and a history of technical mentorship and open-source contributions.
concerns: Limited explicit executive-level technical leadership experience, specifically scaling engineering teams of 10 to 30+ people.
Insufficient demonstrated production experience architecting and operating multi-agent AI systems in a regulated fintech environment.
Lack of clear experience designing and governing hybrid engineering models with external delivery partners.
